activities.name: Introduction
activities.description: Define purpose of DOI and align with the Group Business Expenditure Standard.

activities.name: Group-mandated systems
activities.description: Mandate use of eProcurement, International Mobility/HR, and SODA for all expenditure; classify anything else as 'manual payment' (exceptional).

activities.name: PO Invoices (e-Proc route)
activities.description: DBU (U140) PO invoices raised in eProcurement, submitted to AP team, processed through Tax-Q; Finance assigns Purpose of Payment (POP) and VAT categorization. FCY invoices revalued at central bank rate as of invoice date.
notes: Exchange rate: central bank rate as of invoice date for FCY invoices.
VAT amount calculated in both FCY and LCY using official rates.

activities.name: Manual Invoices (non-e-Proc)
activities.description: Requires invoice + non-e-Proc memo + approvals (Cost Centre Owner, Country Supply Chain Manager, CFO/delegate). Submitted via scan to BH_APUeInvoice mailbox. Exception: GSAM legal/professional fees not covered by GDAM limits.

activities.name: In-country manual payments
activities.description: One-off manual payments require MD + CFO approval, evidence of one-off nature, and vendor screening valid within 48 hours. Recurring manual payments additionally require a written dispensation from the policy owner and are logged in eOPS, with quarterly CFO log retrieval and approval.
notes: Vendor screening must be revalidated every 48 hours.
Account coding captured in approval document.
On payment, invoice marked PAID and submitted to APU team (GBS Bangalore/Chennai) for GL posting.

activities.name: Cross-Border Recharges (CBR)
activities.description: Managed centrally by GBS APU CBR team (Bangalore/Chennai).

activities.name: Clearing Payment Suspense Account
activities.description: Monthly reconciliation of PSGL extract against eBBS extract; aging escalation grid based on item age; GL posting for cost-centre/GL distribution.
notes: Chart fields used include 140-288843-800 (PSGL suspense account).

vat_invoice_types: Zero Rated Purchases (transport, food, healthcare, education, construction, oil/gas)
Out of Scope invoices (pre-Jan 2019, MPV vouchers)

controls.description: All required approvals present before payment release.
Vendor screening revalidated within 48 hours of payment.
Amount payable within DOA limits per GDAM.
Dispensation in place for recurring manual payments.
Monthly PSGL-to-eBBS reconciliation cleared within aging thresholds.
FCY invoices revalued at central bank rate on invoice date.
Duplicate-payment check against existing vendor-invoice combinations.
